## Other services

## DDoS protection
- [About GCore DDoS protection for dedicated servers](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ddos-protection/about-gcore-ddos-protection-for-dedicated-servers.md): Configure Gcore DDoS Protection for Dedicated Servers with Basic or Advanced modes (on-demand/always-on) using TMS traffic filtering against L3-L7 attacks.
- [Activate DDoS protection for your dedicated servers](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ddos-protection/activate-ddos-protection-for-your-dedicated-servers.md): Enable DDoS protection for dedicated servers by specifying OSI layers (L3-L4 or L3-L7), protection mode (on-demand or always-on), bandwidth, and IP whitelist...

## DNS hosting
- [Manage DNS hosting](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/dns-hosting/manage-dns-hosting.md): Order and configure DNS hosting service to manage up to 25 domains, set SOA/MX/A records, and add domains via control panel.

## SSL certificates
- [About SSL certificates](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ssl-certificates/about-ssl-certificates.md): Provision domain-validated (DV) and organization-validated (OV) SSL certificates including RapidSSL, Comodo, and Thawte variants with wildcard subdomain supp...
- [Activate an SSL certificate](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/ssl-certificates/activate-an-ssl-certificate.md): Activate DV and OV SSL certificates by confirming domain ownership via email link or providing company verification details to the certification authority.

## BGP
- [Activate BGP](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/bgp/activate-bgp.md): Enable BGP announcement of dedicated server IP addresses via Control Panel and support ticket for IP mobility and geofencing bypass.

## Link aggreagtion
- [Activate Link aggregation](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/other-services/link-aggreagtion/activate-link-aggregation.md): Configure LACP link aggregation on Ubuntu servers using ifenslave, bonding kernel module, and /etc/interfaces configuration for Port Channel service.

- [Set up two-factor authentication](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/set-up-two-factor-authentication.md): Enable two-factor authentication in user Settings using Google Authenticator QR code or manual key entry, then authorize with six-digit codes and disable 2FA...

- [Add a new user to your account](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/users/add-a-new-user-to-your-account.md): Create new Control Panel user accounts with name, email, and password via Tools menu to grant multi-user access without credential sharing.
- [Configure user rights](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/account-management/users/configure-user-rights.md): Set user permissions in Control Panel via Client > Users > Perm to enable/disable access to sections, operations, and subsections; configure full access or b...

- [Set up auto payment](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/set-up-auto-payment.md): Enable auto payment with configurable monthly charge limit to automatically recharge account balance from bank card for service plan renewals.
- [Troubleshoot payment errors](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/troubleshoot-payment-errors.md): Diagnose payment failures including insufficient funds, declined transactions, unsupported currency-provider combinations, Ayden processing errors, and bank ...

- [Request a refund](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/payments/request-a-refund.md): Submit refund requests via Control Panel support ticket with server details; refunds process to account balance Monday-Friday only.
- [Contact our technical support](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/contact-our-technical-support.md): Access 24/7 technical support via live chat on gcore.com or submit support tickets through Control Panel Support Tickets section.
- [Manage hosting services via API](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/manage-hosting-services-via-api.md): Access Billmanager, DCImanager, and VMmanager APIs to automate server provisioning, dedicated server management, and VPS operations.
- [Become a reseller and resell our services](https://gcore.com/docs/hosting/become-reseller-and-resell-our-services.md): Contact technical support to enroll in reseller program, specify company details and product type (VPS or dedicated server), and receive volume-based discoun...

## Object Storage

S3-compatible storage (S3 Standard, S3 Fast) and SFTP storage; create buckets, manage objects via Customer Portal or AWS CLI, S3cmd, AWS JavaScript SDK, FileZilla; bucket lifecycle policies, ACLs, presigned URLs; S3 endpoints and region names (s-ndp1, s-ndlo, s-ed1, s-drc2); SSH keys for SFTP; use storage as CDN origin; billing tiers; 4xx error troubleshooting.

- [Object Storage](https://gcore.com/docs/storage.md)
- [How storage is billed](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/how-storage-is-billed.md): Compare S3 Standard, S3 Fast, and SFTP storage pricing; understand billing cycles, self-commit plans, and storage limits for Object Storage.
- [Create an object or SFTP storage](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/create-an-s3-or-sftp-storage.md): Create S3 Standard, S3 Fast, or SFTP storage with access keys, SSH keys, password authentication, and configure server aliases and Expires headers.
- [Use storage as the origin for your CDN resource](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/use-storage-as-the-origin-for-your-cdn-resource.md): Configure Object Storage or SFTP as CDN origin with bucket paths, authentication options, and custom domain setup for content delivery.

## Manage object storage
- [Managing buckets through the customer portal](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/manage-buckets-via-the-control-panel.md): Create and manage S3 buckets in Gcore Object Storage via customer portal, including bucket naming rules, CORS configuration, file management, and lifecycle p...

## Configure AWS CLI, S3cmd, and AWS JavaScript SDK
- [Connect AWS CLI, S3cmd, and AWS JavaScript SDK](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/configure-aws-sli-s3cmd-and-aws-javascript-sdk/connect-aws-cli-s3cmd-and-aws-sdk.md): Configure AWS CLI, S3cmd, and AWS JavaScript SDK with Gcore Object Storage using S3-compatible credentials, endpoints, and region names.
- [Remove objects from a bucket automatically with AWS CLI](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/configure-aws-sli-s3cmd-and-aws-javascript-sdk/remove-objects-from-a-bucket-automatically-with-aws-cli.md): Configure S3 bucket lifecycle policies with AWS CLI to automatically expire and remove objects based on age using XML rules.
- [Configure access control on S3 storage with AWS CLI and S3cmd](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/configure-aws-sli-s3cmd-and-aws-javascript-sdk/configure-access-control-on-s3-storage-with-aws-cli-and-s3cmd.md): Configure S3 object and bucket access control using AWS CLI and S3cmd with ACLs and JSON policies for Gcore Object Storage.
- [Generate temporary links to files with AWS CLI and S3cmd](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/configure-aws-sli-s3cmd-and-aws-javascript-sdk/generate-temporary-links-to-files-with-aws-cli-and-s3cmd.md): Generate presigned URLs for S3 objects using AWS CLI and S3cmd with configurable expiration times and IP-based access restrictions.
- [S3 service URLs and default region names](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-object-storage/s3-service-urls-and-default-region-names.md): Configure Gcore Object Storage S3 endpoints and region names (s-ndp1-2, s-ndp1-3, s-ndlo-2, s-ed1, s-drc2) for AWS CLI, boto3, and S3-compatible clients.

## Manage SFTP storage
- [Connect to your storage with FileZilla](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-sftp-storage/connect-to-your-storage-with-filezilla.md): Configure FileZilla SFTP connection to Gcore storage using hostname, port 2200, and password or SSH key authentication.
- [Create and add an SSH key to your storage](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/manage-sftp-storage/create-and-add-an-ssh-key-to-your-storage.md): Upload SSH keys for SFTP storage authentication by pasting key text or importing from file, then assign keys to storages via SSH keys manager.
- [Request content directly from the storage](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/request-content-directly-from-the-storage.md): Request files from object storage and SFTP storage using HTTP/HTTPS URLs with bucket names, hostnames, and file paths.
- [Check storages usage reports](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/check-storages-usage-reports.md): View storage usage metrics (used space, requests, traffic) in Statistics section with filtering by storage type, location, and custom time periods.
- [4xx errors: how to solve storage issues](https://gcore.com/docs/storage/4xx-errors-how-to-solve-storage-issues.md): Diagnose HTTP 404 and 403 errors from Object Storage and SFTP storage requests; verify file uploads, correct URL schemes for regions, and configure ACL rules...

## Video Streaming

Live broadcasting via RTMP, RTMPS, SRT, WebRTC WHIP and VOD with transcoding to HLS, DASH, MP4, AES-128 encryption; low-latency LL-HLS and LL-DASH (~2-5s); DVR pause and rewind, multicamera, HTML overlays, recording, restream to YouTube/Facebook/Twitch; broadcasting software (FFmpeg, GStreamer, Larix, OBS); built-in web player and JS Video Player SDK; custom CDN delivery with secure tokens and auto-refresh; AI services for caption generation and translation in 100+ languages, content moderation (NSFW, hard/soft nudity, sport detection); view and live stream statistics.

- [Gcore Video Streaming](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming.md): Gcore Video Streaming is a high-load video streaming PaaS. Scale to 1M+ viewers and beyond

## AI video services
- [AI video services](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/ai-video-service.md): Generate AI subtitles and translate captions for VOD and live streaming; perform content moderation for nudity, violence, and offensive language using Gcore'...

## Content moderation
- [Content moderation](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation.md): Detect NSFW, nudity, and sports activities in video/image content using AI models with configurable probability thresholds for content filtering and personal...
- [Not safe for work (NSFW) detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/nsfw-detection.md): Detect and flag inappropriate video content using NSFW detection task in Gcore Streaming AI with confidence scoring and frame-level analysis.
- [Hard nudity detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/ai-nudity-detection.md): Detect explicit nudity involving genitals in videos using Gcore Streaming AI content moderation with confidence scoring and frame-level results.
- [Soft nudity detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/soft-nudity-detection.md): Detect explicit and partial nudity including faces and uncovered body parts in videos using soft nudity content moderation task with frame-level confidence s...
- [Sport detection](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/content-moderation/sport-detection.md): Detect sporting activities, actions, and events in videos using content moderation API with confidence scores and frame-level identification.

## Generate and translate captions
- [Generate and translate captions](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/ai-for-video/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video.md): Generate video captions and translate subtitles using Whisper ASR and AI models via Gcore API or Customer Portal for 100+ languages.
- [Generate and translate AI captions in the customer portal](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video/generate-captions-in-customer-portal.md): Create AI caption generation and translation tasks in Gcore Customer Portal for MP4 videos via Streaming > AI, selecting audio language, subtitle language, a...
- [Generate and translate AI captions for VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/ai-video-service/generate-ai-subtitles-and-add-them-to-video/generate-captions-via-api.md): Generate AI captions and translate subtitles for VOD videos using Video Streaming API or AI API with transcription and multi-language translation parameters.
- [Streaming usage and billing metrics](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/how-the-streaming-platform-and-additional-features-are-billed.md): Explanation of how streaming services and features are measured for billing

## Codecs and protocols
- [Accepted input parameters for live streams and videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streams-and-videos-protocols-and-codecs/input-parameters-and-codecs.md)
- [Output parameters after transcoding: codecs, bitrate, frame rate](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streams-and-videos-protocols-and-codecs/output-parameters-and-codecs.md)
- [RTMP](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/rtmp.md): Ingesting original streams via RTMP, RTMPS protocols
- [SRT](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/srt.md): Ingesting original streams via SRT protocol
- [WebRTC WHIP to HLS/DASH](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/webrtc.md): Ingest via WebRTC WHIP and transcoding to LL-HLS/LL-DASH
- [RTMP vs SRT: protocol comparison](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/protocols/rtmp-srt.md): Key differences of RTMP vs SRT, behavior on unstable networks, and guidance on choosing the right ingest protocol.

## Extra features
- [Built-in web player](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/extra-features/customize-appearance-of-the-built-in-player.md): Settings, customization and use by direct link
- [JS Video Player & SDK](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/api/player-api-tutorial.md): SDK of embeddable and customizable JS player for web
- [Video streaming API tutorial](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/api/streaming-platform-api-tutorial.md): Integrate Video Streaming API using post_streams, post_broadcasts, patch_streams, patch_broadcasts endpoints and webhooks for stream creation, broadcast mana...
- [Webhooks on system state changes](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/extra-features/get-webhooks-from-the-streaming-platform.md): Know about changing the status of Lives, VOD, and Restreams

## Interaction with CDN

## Broadcasting software
- [FFmpeg](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/ffmpeg.md): Configure FFmpeg command-line parameters (bitrate, encoder, keyframe interval, resolution, audio sample rate) to stream video to Gcore Video Streaming via RTMP.
- [GStreamer](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/gstreamer.md): Build GStreamer pipelines with videotestsrc, x264enc, and srtsink/rtmpsink to encode and push H.264/AAC streams to Gcore RTMP or SRT ingest endpoints.
- [Larix](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/larix.md): Configure Larix mobile encoder with RTMP URL, Larix Grove QR code, and stream parameters (bitrate, resolution, FPS, keyframe interval) for Gcore Video Stream...
- [Open Broadcaster Software](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/broadcasting-software/obs.md): Configure OBS encoder settings (Server URL, Stream Key, Video Bitrate, Audio Bitrate) to push RTMP live streams to Gcore Video Streaming platform.
- [Instant clips](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/clips.md): Creating instant video clips from a live stream
- [Pause and rewind the live streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/pause-and-rewind-the-live-streams.md): Enable DVR feature to cache live streams for 1-4 hours, allowing viewers to pause and rewind broadcasts using PATCH /streaming/streams/{id} API or UI toggle.
- [How low-latency streaming works](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/how-low-latency-streaming-works.md)
- [Combine multiple live streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/combine-multiple-live-streams.md): Combine multiple live streams into one player with multicamera feature, enabling viewers to switch between streams by angle, language, or content using playe...

- [Understanding of PTS and DTS in RTMP/SRT master streams](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/pts-dts.md): How invalid PTS/DTS timestamps in master streams affect transcoding, CDN delivery, and playback
- [Primary, Backup, and Global Ingest Points for PUSH and PULL](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/primary-backup.md): Multiple geo distributed ingest points and limits of getting original stream
- [Record your live streams and save them as videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/record-your-live-streams-and-save-them-as-videos.md): Record live streams manually or automatically via Gcore Customer Portal or API, storing video fragments in Streaming Storage with automatic splitting for int...
- [create-and-configure-a-restream-to-social-media](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/live-streaming/create-and-configure-a-restream-to-social-media.md)

## WebRTC issues
- [Fix the camera or microphone if they do not work](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/real-time-video-issues/fix-the-camera-or-microphone-if-they-do-not-work.md): Troubleshoot camera and microphone issues in video calls by verifying browser compatibility (Chrome 70+, Firefox 70+, Safari 12+, Edge 79+, Opera 60+) and en...
- [Audio quality is reduced when using bluetooth headsets in video call apps](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/faq/real-time-video-issues/audio-quality-is-reduced-when-using-bluetooth-headsets-in-video-call-apps.md): Bluetooth audio quality degrades in video calls because A2DP high-quality profile switches to low-quality HSP/HFP profile when microphone is needed.

- [Delete uploaded videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/delete-videos.md): Delete uploaded videos via Gcore Customer Portal or DELETE /videos API endpoint; permanently removes video data, transcoded versions, subtitles, and screensh...
- [Download files](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/original-files.md): This article explains the storage and capability to download transcoded versions
- [Protect your videos with the AES-128 encryption](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/protect-your-videos-with-the-aes-128-encryption.md): Enable AES-128 encryption for HLS video delivery by configuring a keyserver to manage decryption key distribution via Gcore API integration.
- [HEVC, AV1, and VP9 multi-codec VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/multi-codec.md)
- [HLS, MPEG-DASH, and MP4](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/hls-and-mp4.md)
- [Create an illusion of a live broadcast with uploaded videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/create-an-illusion-of-a-live-broadcast-with-uploaded-videos.md): Configure Live imitation to broadcast uploaded videos at scheduled times with iframe player embedding and playlist sequencing.
- [Videos with multiple audio tracks](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/multi-audio.md): Playing videos with multiple audio tracks in different languages
- [Create and configure playlists for videos](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/create-and-configure-playlists-for-videos.md): Create playlists containing up to 512 videos, configure playback order, and embed playlist code on websites via Gcore Streaming portal.
- [Video Lifecycle and Statuses](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/vod-status.md): Understanding Video Transcoding and Processing Statuses
- [Subtitles and closed captions for VOD](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/subtitles-and-closed-captions-for-vod.md): Configure subtitles and closed captions for VOD using SRT and WebVTT formats with Gcore Player's timed text tracks.
- [Timeline hover previews: use with players and Roku devices](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/timeline-hover-previews-use-in-players-and-roku-devices.md): Enable timeline hover previews (trick play) with storyboard tiles in Gcore Player, WebVTT format, and Roku HLS/DASH manifests for video scrubbing.
- [Upload video via API to VOD storage](https://gcore.com/docs/streaming/video-hosting/upload-video-via-api.md): Upload videos to Gcore VOD storage via API using copy from external storage, local device upload, or batch migration methods with HLS/MP4 transcoding.

## DDoS protection

Basic (null-routing) and Advanced (TMS on-demand or always-on) DDoS mitigation for networks and servers; GRE tunneling with BGP routing, ACL rules, custom protection profiles including Minecraft and Counter-Strike protocol-aware templates; Super Transit anycast network with GRE for L3/L4/L7 attack mitigation; DDoS events log, Gcore Radar attack methodology reports.

- [DDoS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection.md)
- [About DDoS Protection](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/about-ddos-protection.md): Protect servers from DDoS attacks using Basic (null-routing) or Advanced (on-demand/always-on TMS) protection modes with configurable ACL rules.

## Onboarding service
- [Service activation](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/service-activation.md): Set up DDoS Protection service activation through Onboarding with plan creation, network submission, NOC review, and network configuration steps.
- [Plan activation](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/plan-activation.md): Activate DDoS Protection tariff plans in Gcore portal with payment card details and 7-day free trial option.
- [Network submission](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/network-submission.md): Submit networks for DDoS protection via the Protected networks form using CIDR notation, AS number, and Letter of Authorization PDF document.
- [Review and approval](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/review-and-approval.md): NOC team reviews and approves AS number and network CIDR submissions, validating LOA documents and sending approval notifications with next steps.
- [Network configuration](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/network-configuration.md): Configure GRE endpoint and protection profile for DDoS-protected networks in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Configure a custom protection profile](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/custom-protection-profile-configuration.md): Create custom DDoS protection profiles with rules and policies for network traffic filtering, including protocol-aware templates for Minecraft and Counter-St...
- [Apply a custom profile to a protected network](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/apply-a-custom-profile-to-a-protected-network.md): Assign custom DDoS protection profiles to protected networks via Gcore Customer Portal's Edit protected network dialog and Profile dropdown.

## GRE tunneling
- [About Gcore's DDoS protection with GRE tunneling and BGP routing](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/gre-tunneling/about-gcore-ddos-protection-with-gre-tunneling-and-bgp-routing.md): Configure GRE tunneling and BGP routing for DDoS protection with MTU/MSS optimization and autonomous system path selection.
- [Set a GRE tunnel with Gcore](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/gre-tunneling/set-a-gre-tunnel-with-gcore.md): Configure GRE tunnel endpoints on Cisco routers with tunnel ID, IP addressing, MTU/MSS limits, and BGP peering for traffic routing.
- [Troubleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/onboarding-service/troubleshooting.md): Resolve network submission failures, pending status delays, GRE endpoint configuration errors, and custom profile visibility issues with CIDR validation, AS ...

## Super transit
- [Super transit](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/super-transit.md): Route traffic through Gcore's anycast network using Super Transit for DDoS mitigation, threat detection, and latency optimization via GRE tunneling.
- [Configure your infrastructure for Super Transit](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/super-transit/configure-super-transit.md): Enable Super Transit DDoS protection by configuring anycast tunneling, verifying router MSS clamping support, IRR entries, ASNs, and RPKI validation for on-p...
- [Gcore radar reports methodologies](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/gcore-radar-reports-methodologies.md): Analyze DDoS attack patterns from Gcore scrubbing centers using Radar report methodologies: origin/victim geolocation, industry targeting, attack characteris...
- [DDoS events log](https://gcore.com/docs/ddos-protection/events-log.md): Access DDoS events log in Gcore Customer Portal to view attack metrics (BPS, PPS, source IPs) from past three months for incident analysis and trend identifi...

## Edge Proxy

Network-layer DDoS protection on Gcore CDN edge with Anycast IP addresses and PoP-based traffic filtering; configure TCP/UDP applications and origin endpoints for game servers and backend services; translation rules between Anycast endpoints and origins.

- [Overview](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/overview.md): Deploy DDoS protection using Gcore CDN edge infrastructure with Anycast IP addresses, PoP-based traffic filtering, and translation rules for origin servers.
- [Setup and configuration](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/setup-and-configuration.md): Configure Edge Proxy with origin IP, port, protocol (TCP/UDP), and application type to create protected endpoints for game servers and applications.
- [FAQs and trobleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-proxy/faqs-and-trobleshooting.md): Resolve common Edge Proxy issues: DDoS protection setup, TCP/UDP application configuration, DNS updates, Anycast IP assignment, and connection troubleshooting.

## WAAP

Web Application and API Protection with WAF policies (OWASP Top 10, Behavioral WAF, CMS protection for WordPress/MODX/Drupal), bot management (Known Bots, Anti-automation, Invalid User-Agent), API Discovery and protection with reserved tags and base path configuration, custom and advanced rules using CEL expressions with Allow/Block/CAPTCHA/JS Challenge/Tag actions, rate limiting, IP firewall and IP Reputation, L7 DDoS protection, Threat Intelligence (Security Insights, IP Spotlight), custom response pages, analytics dashboard with traffic and event metrics, troubleshooting blocked users and 5xx errors.

- [Overview](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/overview.md): Gcore WAAP provides real-time application-layer protection with WAF policies, bot management, API protection, rate limiting, IP controls, and threat intellig...

## Getting started
- [Configure WAAP for a new domain](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/configure-waap-for-a-domain.md): Create CDN resource with WAAP enabled, configure origin server details, update DNS records, and verify traffic routing through Gcore network.
- [Manage domains protected with WAAP](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/manage-domains.md): Disable or delete WAAP-protected domains in CDN resources; manage domain statuses (Monitoring, Protection, Disabled) and toggle WAAP protection in Security s...
- [Billing](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/getting-started/billing.md): Configure WAAP billing plans (Free, Start, Pro, Enterprise) with feature availability for IP Firewall, WAF rules, Bot Management, and API Security across Dom...

## Analytics
- [WAAP Analytics](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/waap-analytics.md): Monitor WAAP-protected application traffic, security events, and attack patterns across domains via Dashboard, Events, and Domains analytics sections.
- [Dashboard](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/dashboard.md): Monitor WAAP traffic across account and domain scopes; view detected/prevented attacks, request metrics, and security anomalies via consolidated dashboard fo...
- [Events](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/events.md): Filter HTTP requests and security events in WAAP Events by time range, event type, action (Blocked/Monitored/Allowed/Passed), country, IP, path, HTTP method,...
- [Domains](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/analytics/domains.md): View protected applications, APIs, and services in WAAP inventory; filter domains for incident investigation, environment isolation, and attack pressure anal...

## Firewall
- [Access control](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/access-control.md): Configure WAAP Firewall allowed/blocked IPs, IP ranges, and CDN security policies to permit or deny traffic by IP address, geography, and request metadata.
- [IP Reputation](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/ip-reputation.md): Block malicious IP addresses using WAAP IP Reputation policies: TOR networks, proxies, hosting services, VPNs, bots, NAT ranges, external blocklists, and CDNs.
- [Check IP](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/firewall/check-ip.md): Verify IP address reputation in WAAP with local and global reputation tags, detection timestamps, and domain associations.
- [L7 DDoS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/ddos-protection.md): Detect and mitigate Layer 7 DDoS attacks on web applications using WAAP Monitoring and Protection modes with configurable global thresholds.

## Default Rules
- [WAAP policies](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies.md): Configure WAAP policy groups to block malicious traffic, prevent data breaches, filter bots, and customize security rules for web applications.
- [OWASP threats](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/waf-and-owasp-top-threats.md): Configure WAF & OWASP Top 10 policies including SQL injection, XSS, shellshock, open redirect, and PII detection rules in Gcore Customer Portal.
- [Behavioral WAF](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/behavioral-waf.md): Configure Behavioral WAF policies in WAAP to block brute-force, probing, obfuscated attacks, and repeated violations using CAPTCHA and JavaScript validation.
- [CMS protection](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/cms-protection.md): Configure WAAP CMS protection policies to allowlist authenticated WordPress, MODX, and Drupal admin sessions while blocking known CMS exploits.

## Custom Rules
- [WAAP rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules.md): Configure WAAP firewall, custom, and advanced rules with IP allowlists/blocklists, geolocation, SQL injection, XSS, and string-matching criteria to protect w...
- [Custom Rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules.md): Create WAAP custom rules with conditions and actions (Allow, Block, CAPTCHA, JS Challenge, Tag) to filter web requests, control URL access, and enforce rate ...
- [Rate-Limiting](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/advanced-rate-limiting-rules.md): Configure request.limit_rate method with threshold, time window, filters, and aggregation scope to enforce rate limiting rules via WAAP API.

## Advanced rules
- [Advanced Rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules.md): Create and manage advanced WAAP custom rules using Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax via API with complex conditional logic and single-action enforcement.
- [Advanced rule objects and attributes](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/advanced-rule-objects.md): Reference advanced rule objects and attributes including client_data, request, response containers with fingerprint, headers, status, rate_limit, and ip_in_r...
- [Source field objects in advanced rule expressions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/advanced-rules/source-field-objects.md): Reference source field objects (request, headers, ip, uri, path, method, origin_ip, ja3) and syntax for advanced rule expressions in WAF/security policies.

## Tag rules
- [Tag rules](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules.md): Create tag-based and tag-generating rules in WAAP custom rules to filter traffic using predefined tags, user-defined tags, and conditional logic.
- [Reserved tags](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules/reserved-tags.md): Configure reserved tags in WAAP custom rules to trigger specific actions: Registered, Logged In, Paid, Monitor, API Privileged Access, Auth Endpoint, and oth...
- [Predefined tags and their descriptions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-rules/custom-rules/tag-rules/predefined-tags.md): Reference predefined tags with API slugs for filtering and sanctioning web requests using behavioral analysis, heuristics, and AI models in tag-based rules.

- [Invalid user agent and unknown user agent](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/invalid-user-agent-and-unknown-user-agent.md): Block requests with missing or non-standard user-agent headers using WAAP invalid user agent and unknown user agent policies.

- [Protocol validation](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/waap-policies/protocol-validation.md): Configure HTTP/HTTPS protocol validation rules in WAAP Bot Management to block non-compliant requests, malformed methods, and service protocol tampering.

## FAQs
- [Frequently asked questions](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions.md): Resolve common WAAP questions about JavaScript injection, required cookies, and storage variables.
- [How does WAAP JavaScript injection work?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/javascript-injection.md): Explain WAAP JavaScript injection mechanism for client fingerprinting, browser signatures, and GUI interaction detection via cookies and /sbbi/ endpoint.
- [What are the required cookies used by WAAP?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/waap-cookies.md): Document WAAP cookies with Set-Cookie response headers, sessionID, usertag, CSRF protection, CAPTCHA validation, DDoS protection, and load balancing attributes.
- [What storage variables does WAAP use?](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/frequently-asked-questions/storage-variables.md): List local storage variables used by WAAP including cnv, csr, otr, and altutgv2 for CAPTCHA, mouse tracking, and user tag token data.
- [Troubleshooting](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting.md): Diagnose and resolve Gcore WAAP issues including bot protection, blocked users, and 5xx server errors.
- [Troubleshoot blocked users](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-blocked-users.md): Diagnose blocked users by searching Reference IDs in WAAP Events, inspecting request details including IP, timestamp, HTTP method, and triggered security rules.
- [Troubleshoot 5xx errors](https://gcore.com/docs/waap/troubleshooting/troubleshoot-5xx-errors.md): Diagnose 5xx server errors in WAAP including 543 errors caused by origin server downtime, firewall blocks, misconfigurations, or connection timeouts.
